codeReview.summary: The feature 'shell-theme-profile-company-cmd' focused on verifying and polishing five shell features: theme toggle, profile menu, company switcher, command palette, and sign out. The implementation was minimal, focused, and high-quality. The worker added accessibility attributes (aria-label, aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, role='menu', role='menuitem') to ProfileMenu.tsx and created comprehensive test coverage (10 test cases). All validation assertions (VAL-NAV-007 through VAL-NAV-011) were verified via agent-browser against the real backend.

summary: Feature successfully implemented and verified. The worker confirmed all 5 shell features work correctly: theme toggle persists across reloads (VAL-NAV-007), profile menu shows user info and navigates properly (VAL-NAV-008), company switcher displays companies from API with current selection marked (VAL-NAV-009), command palette opens on Ctrl+K with search/filter functionality (VAL-NAV-010), and sign out clears tokens and redirects to login (VAL-NAV-011). Added accessibility improvements and test coverage to ProfileMenu. No blocking issues found.
